8:I[4902,["972","static/chunks/972-4a2221276744b501.js","712","static/chunks/712-2dde1a71ebc19675.js","185","static/chunks/app/layout-78b21f889c52d68c.js"],"AuthProvider"]
9:I[4114,["972","static/chunks/972-4a2221276744b501.js","712","static/chunks/712-2dde1a71ebc19675.js","185","static/chunks/app/layout-78b21f889c52d68c.js"],"Navbar"]
3:T8f4,<br/>## Client Profile<br/><br/>**Radiance MedSpa Network** operates 6 locations across California:<br/>- Los Angeles, San Diego, San Francisco<br/>- Pasadena, Newport Beach, Santa Monica<br/>- Specialties: Injectable Fillers, Laser Treatments, Body Contouring<br/>- Rapid expansion phase over 4 years<br/><br/>## The Challenge<br/><br/>The chain faced a critical paradox: More locations = More visibility problems. Each new location struggled to establish independent AI presence while brand recognition existed.<br/><br/>**Total annual loss across 6 locations: $2.63M**<br/><br/>## Our Solution: Multi-Location GEO Strategy<br/><br/>### Phase 1: Unified Knowledge Graph (Days 1-45)<br/>- Created hierarchical structured data (brand → locations → services)<br/>- Implemented location-specific service catalogs<br/>- Built content strategy with local customization<br/><br/>### Phase 2: Location Authority Building (Days 46-90)<br/>- Neighborhood-specific content for each location<br/>- Review aggregation across 2,400+ reviews<br/>- Local partnership citations<br/><br/>### Phase 3: Cross-Location Authority (Days 91-120)<br/>- Brand-level authority establishment<br/>- Multi-location comparison content<br/>- Competitive moat building<br/><br/>## The Results<br/><br/>| Metric | Total Impact |<br/>|--------|--------------|<br/>| Combined AI Visibility | Avg 35 → 69 (+97%) |<br/>| Total AI Referrals (mo) | 0 → 186 |<br/>| Revenue from AI Source | $4.2M (6 months) |<br/>| Marketing Cost Reduction | 45% |<br/><br/>### ROI Analysis<br/><br/>**Investment:**<br/>- GEO Implementation: $85K<br/>- Ongoing optimization: $12K/month<br/>- Total Year 1: $229K<br/><br/>**Return:**<br/>- Additional revenue: $8.4M<br/>- Marketing savings: $564K<br/>- **ROI: 3,811%**<br/><br/>## Network Effects Observed<br/><br/>1. **Brand Recognition Amplification**: AI engines associated "Radiance" with "California MedSpa"<br/>2. **Content Efficiency**: One comprehensive guide = Six location-specific versions<br/>3. **Review Velocity**: Combined 2,400+ reviews created authority momentum<br/><br/>### Client Testimonial<br/><br/>"The key was treating each location as both independent AND connected. The GEO strategy understood that nuance."<br/><br/>— Jennifer Walsh, Marketing Director<br/>    5:["id","california-medspa","d"]
